framework.title: Academic Oversight
framework.description: Program quality is monitored through Kathmandu University guidelines, internal reviews, and continuous faculty development initiatives.

framework.title: Participatory Leadership
framework.description: Experienced academic leaders and administrators collaborate with faculty, staff, and student representatives in decision-making.

framework.title: Quality Assurance
framework.description: Regular assessments, accreditation reviews, and performance metrics ensure institutional standards are maintained and improved.

framework.title: Institutional Accountability
framework.description: Transparent reporting, financial oversight, and compliance with regulatory standards demonstrate our commitment to responsible management.

governingBodies.title: Institutional Board
governingBodies.description: Provides strategic oversight and long-term vision for institutional development and sustainability.

governingBodies.title: Academic Council
governingBodies.description: Oversees curriculum development, program quality, and faculty development initiatives.

governingBodies.title: Administrative Leadership
governingBodies.description: Manages daily operations, student services, and institutional support systems.

principles.title: Transparency
principles.description: Open communication about policies, decisions, and performance metrics affecting the college community.

principles.title: Accountability
principles.description: Clear responsibility for outcomes and continuous monitoring of institutional performance.

principles.title: Student-Centered Focus
principles.description: Every policy and decision prioritizes student success, safety, and overall development.

principles.title: Academic Integrity
principles.description: Maintaining high standards in teaching, research, and institutional reputation through ethical practices.
